---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement aligned to the project direction
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem statement

What user or contributor problem does this solve?

## Proposed direction

Describe the smallest useful version of the change.

## Scope check

Does this proposal stay within the currently accepted direction?

- [ ] Rust-first
- [ ] runtime composition
- [ ] resources-only v1
- [ ] first resource families remain HTTP/OpenAPI-backed and filesystem/static
- [ ] Apache-2.0 baseline
- [ ] MCP spec baseline remains `2025-11-25` unless an explicit re-pin is proposed

If not, explain what decision would need to change.

## Additional context

Add links, examples, or prior discussion here.
